title: rosa canina subvar. valdearmata
intro: Rosa canina subvar. valdearmata, also known as the Valdearmata Rose, is a variant of the Rosa canina species, commonly referred to as the Dog Rose. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa canina subvar. valdearmata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, as well as used to make rose hip oil and other topical preparations.
